ベリサ、肩の力を抜いてゆっくり深呼吸するんだ。: Verisa, relax your shoulders and take slow, deep breaths.
ね、ねぇ……？ 大丈夫なの？: Um, hey...are you going to be okay?
魔力の使い過ぎで貧血を起こしてるだけだろう。<br>マリナ、悪いがタオルを水で冷:
She's just suffering anemia from overusing her magic.
Marina, would you mind soaking a towel in cool water for me?
あなた、医術の心得があるの？: Do you know your way around medicine?
ごく基本的なことをちょっと知ってる程度だ。<br>ソフィアも騎士養成学校で、応急:
Enough to get by.
Sophia, you learned first aid at your knight academy, didn't you?
まあ、一応……<br>だけど、教科書で学んだぐらいよ？:
Well, sort of...
but only from a textbook, you know?
今はそれで十分だ。<br>マリナ、冷やしたタオルをベリサの額に置いてくれ。:
That's enough for now.
Marina, put the cooled towel on Verisa's forehead.
他に症状は？ 息苦しいとか、目が霞むとか、<br>体のどこかが激しく痛んだり、痺:
Any other symptoms? Trouble breathing, blurry vision,
any severe pain or numbness anywhere?
ん～ん。おにーさんが最初に言ったので、全部……: Mm-mm. Just what you first said, all of it...
そっか。呼吸困難とか体の痛みって……<br>モンスターの毒を受けた可能性も考慮し:
I see. Trouble breathing and body pain—
you were also factoring in the possibility of monster venom?
ご名答だ。よく勉強してるじゃないか。: Exactly right. You've done your homework.
旦那さま。ベリサちゃんは治るんですかぁ？: Master. Is Verisa going to be okay~?
このまましばらく安静にしてれば少しは回復するだろう。<br>まったく、だから魔力:
If she rests like this for a while, she should recover some.
Honestly, that's why I told her not to overuse her magic.
うぅぅ……ごめんなさぁぃ……だってぇ……<br>おにーさんに格の違いを見せつけた:
Uuuu...I'm sorry...it's just...
I wanted to show you how much stronger I am.
いったい誰と戦ってるんだ。<br>仲間内での小競り合いは、これっきりにするんだぞ:
Who exactly are you competing with? Let's make this the last time we
have petty squabbles among teammates.
とにかく今はゆっくり休め。<br>マリナ、何か甘い物でも残ってないか？ ベリサに:
For now, just rest.
Marina, do you have anything sweet left? Give it to Verisa.
ありますよぉ～蜂蜜を固めて作った美味しいオヤツが♪<br>あっ、安心してください:
I do~! A delicious snack made of hardened honey♪
Oh, don't worry! No charge for this one♪
ベリサ、さっきは言い過ぎてごめんね？<br>あなたの援護射撃があるほうが戦いやす:
Verisa, I'm sorry for going too far earlier.
Your covering fire makes it much easier to fight. That's why I...
ううん、あたしの方こそごめん。<br>せっかく盾で守ろうとしてくれてたのに無駄に:
No, I'm the one who should be sorry.
You were trying to protect me with your shield and I just ignored it...
ふふふっ♪ 皆さん仲直りできたみたいですねぇ。<br>はぁ～い、甘いオヤツ食べて:
Hehehe♪ It looks like everyone made up~.
Here~, eat a sweet treat and get your strength back~.
可愛い寝顔ですね～。フフフフッ♪: Such a cute sleeping face~. Hehehehe♪
よし、俺たちも小休止だな。: Alright, let's take a short break ourselves.
（さっきの地震、それに徐々に視界の悪くなる雰囲気……。<br>やはり砂嵐を引き起:
(That earthquake earlier, and the visibility slowly getting worse...
The cause of the sandstorm is likely...)
ねえってば！<br>ちょっと、シカトしないでよ！:
Hey, I said hey!
Don't just ignore me!
んっ！？ おっと、すまない。<br>考え事をしててな……:
Hmm!? Oh, sorry.
I was lost in thought...
ねぇ……もしも、今調査しているものが厄災の予兆だったとして、<br>厄災に対抗す:
Hey...if what we're investigating really is a precursor to a Calamity,
do you have a plan for dealing with it?
まともに正面からぶつかっても相手にならないことは確かだな……: Meeting it head-on wouldn't do us any good, that much is certain...
どういう意味？ “飢餓の厄災”が攻め込んできた時、<br>私たちは何とか撃退でき:
What do you mean? When the Calamity of Famine attacked,
we managed to drive it off, didn't we!
ソフィアは、”飢餓の厄災”を<br>撃退したと思っているのか？:
Do you really think we
'drove off' the Calamity of Famine?
あの時、飢餓の厄災は、私たちの攻撃や<br>基地からの大量の砲撃によって消滅した:
At the time, the Calamity of Famine should have been destroyed
by our attacks and the barrage of cannon fire from the base, right?
それは違う。<br>飢餓の厄災は、消滅はしていない。:
That's not right.
The Calamity of Famine was not destroyed.
はぁっ！？ 消滅していないって……<br>ど、どういうことよ！:
What!? Not destroyed...
W-what do you mean!
飢餓の厄災は、逃亡しただけだ。<br>きっと、あいつはまだ、どこかで息をひそめて:
The Calamity of Famine merely fled.
I'm sure it's still out there somewhere, laying low and alive...
大穴のどこかで力を蓄え、<br>また人間たちを襲撃する機会を伺ってな。:
Building its strength somewhere in the Abyss,
waiting for the chance to attack humanity again.
あれあれ～？ ２人で内緒話なんてあっやしいなぁ～。: Hmm~? Whispering secrets to each other—suspicious~.
ベリサ、もう起きても大丈夫なの？: Verisa, are you feeling well enough to be up already?
ベリサちゃんならもうとっくに目が覚めてましたよぉ～。: Verisa was already wide awake a while ago~.
うんっ！ 飢餓の厄災はまだ生きているってトコまでね。: Yep! Up to the part where the Calamity of Famine is still alive.
で、旦那さまは厄災にどう立ち向かうおつもりなんですかぁ？: So, Master, how are you planning to deal with the Calamity~?
そう、そこよ。そろそろ話してくれてもいいんじゃないかしら？<br>前線基地司令官:
Yes, that's the question. Don't you think it's time you told us?
Your real aim as Commander of the frontline base.
そうだな……。まぁ、別に隠してたってわけじゃないんだが、<br>今回の調査の目的:
Right... Well, it's not like I was hiding it,
but there's actually one more objective to this investigation.
さっきマリナが発見したアビスジェムのように、<br>この大穴には、珍しい鉱物や資:
Like the Abyss Gems Marina discovered earlier, you know many
unusual minerals and resources have been found here, right?
大穴の中に、珍しい物質が転がっているのは、<br>空間の歪みが原因だと言われてい:
The presence of unusual materials in the Abyss is said to be caused
by distortions in space, isn't it.
知ってる～！ 別の世界の空間から色んな物が飛んで来ちゃってるんでしょ？<br>異:
I know~! All sorts of things come flying in from other worlds, right?
There's even a rumor that people end up here from other worlds too~.
信じがたい話ですよね～。<br>別の世界と繋がってるなんて、まるっきり、おとぎ話:
Quite hard to believe~.
Connected to another world—it sounds like a complete fairy tale.
前線基地のあの巨大な壁はお前たちも知っているだろ？<br>あの強固な壁は、トレス:
You all know that giant wall at the base, right?
It's reinforced with minerals and materials not found in Treslia.
なるほど。<br>モンスターの襲撃を受けてもビクともしないのはそういう理由だった:
I see.
So that's why it doesn't budge even when monsters attack.
そこで俺は考えた。飢餓の厄災を退けることに成功した鍵は、<br>大穴内で発見され:
So here's what I'm thinking. The key to repelling the Calamity
could lie in the unusual ores and foreign materials from the Abyss.
つまり、つまり～、大穴の中で集めたもので厄災を倒しちゃおうってことぉ？: So basically~, use Abyss stuff to beat the Calamity~?
まだ憶測でしかないがな。未知の敵を相手にするならば、<br>こちらも異世界の異物:
Still just speculation. But against an unknown enemy,
countering with otherworldly materials seems like the best bet.
さすがお目が高い！ 異世界からの異物ってどれもこれも貴重な品で、<br>とぉ～っ:
Now that's a sharp eye! Foreign materials from other worlds
are all precious, and they fetch incredibly high prices♡
さらに異物の中には、何に使うのかすら分からない、<br>もはや値段がつけられない:
And among those materials, there are apparently things whose
purpose is completely unknown—objects that can't even be given a price!
んふっ、んふふふ……商人魂が燃えてきますよぉ♡: Hnfufu, hnfufufu... my merchant soul is on fire♡
もう1つの調査の目的ってのはその、異世界からの異物を見つけることなのね。<br>:
So our second objective is finding otherworldly materials. But how do
you use something when you don't even know what it's for?
それは商人というよりも、研究者の領分かもな。<br>そっち方面に強い協力者が見つ:
That would be more in the domain of a researcher than a merchant.
If we could find someone with expertise in that area...
おしゃべりタイムもここまでみたいだねっ！<br>みんな準備はいい？:
Looks like chat time is over!
Is everyone ready?
そう言うベリサはもう大丈夫なのか？: Speaking of which, Verisa—are you really okay?
さっき休んだおかげで、す～っかり回復したから安心してっ！: I got plenty of rest just now so I'm fully recovered, don't worry!
いいな？ むやみやたらと魔法を撃つのは控えるんぞ？: And you're sure you won't fire magic wildly and recklessly?
おっけー！ それじゃーおにーさん。か弱いベリサちゃんが<br>魔法を使わなくても:
Okay~! Then Onii-san, come up with an amazing plan
so even delicate Verisa-chan can win without magic~!
まったく、ムチャクチャなことを……: Good grief, the demands you make...
